modules.title: Is 6 Weeks of THE WORK Right For Me?
modules.content: This program is no walk in the park—and it's not for beginners. You'll sweat, yell—hell, you'll probably even swear. But by the time you complete this program you'll be so much stronger, physically and mentally. If that sounds too intense, try 4 Weeks of THE PREP™ to help you gear up for the kind of training you’ll see in THE WORK.

modules.title: What Are the Workouts Like?
modules.content: Five days a week you'll do intense 45-minute workouts that combine six training elements: strength, hypertrophy, endurance, power, agility, and mobility. Sweat will pour and your stamina will be tested, but if you want to achieve your ultimate total-body transformation, this is how you do it. Don't worry—you'll also get one rest day and one shorter active repair day for incredible mobility work.

modules.title: Want to do THE WORK but need a stronger baseline of fitness? Start with THE PREP.
modules.content: THE WORK is an advanced-level program and you need to pass the Fit Test to make sure it’s right for you. If you don’t pass the test at first, start with 4 Weeks of THE PREP™. With modifications for every exercise, these shorter workouts will help you get your body ready for advanced training.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: BODi’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.
